title: M&G MULTICOLOR B/POINT PEN 0.7 ( 6 COLOURS )
subtitle: M&G MULTICOLOR B/POINT PEN
overview: Product Introduction: The M&G Party Lunch 0.7mm 6-in-1 Multicolor Ballpoint Pen is perfect for those who enjoy adding variety and color to their writing. With six vibrant ink colors—blue, black, orange, green, purple, and pink—you can easily switch between colors for notes, journaling, and doodling. The pen also features an adorable design with animal characters like a bear, penguin, and sheep, adding a playful touch to your stationery. Its 0.7mm tip provides smooth and precise writing, making it a must-have for students, office workers, or anyone who loves fun and functionality in their pens. Product Highlights: Adorable Animal-Themed Design: Featuring bear, penguin, and sheep characters. 6 Vibrant Ink Colors: Includes blue, black, orange, green, purple, and pink. 0.7mm Fine Tip: Ensures smooth, precise, and effortless writing. Convenient 6-in-1 Multi-Color Selection: Easily switch between six vibrant ink colors for creative note-taking, journaling, doodling, and writing tasks.. Clip

Fun and Practical:A playful addition to your stationery for school, office, or personal use.

title: M&G 4 COLOURS SEMI-GEL B/POlNT PEN 0.7 ( 4 MATE)
subtitle: M&G 4 COLOURS SEMI-GEL
overview: Our M&G 4 Colours Semi-Gel Ballpoint Pen 4 Mate is a  4 in 1 multi-coloured semi-gel ballpoint pen that offers a convenient solution for writing in different ink colours. With black, blue, red, and green inks, the pen features a colour-coded ink selector for easy access. The pen has a comfortable rubber grip and retractable convenience, making it easy to use. Additionally, it comes with a spring clip that allows for secure attachment to notebooks or pockets.

title: M&G MULTI FUNCTION 3 COLOURS B/POINT PEN 0.7 WITH MECH/PENCIL ( SMART )
subtitle: M&G MULTI FUNCTION 3
overview: The M&G Multi-Function Pen with Mechanical Pencil offers a versatile writing experience. It combines a 0.7mm ball pen in Black, Blue, and Red ink with a 0.5mm mechanical pencil, featuring a comfortable rubber grip for precision. With a simple click, switch between ink colours effortlessly. Its lightweight design and sturdy clip make it easy to carry in your notebook or pocket. A versatile companion for any writing task.

title: M&G B/POINT PEN 0.7 ( SEMI GEL ) ( TR3 PLUS )
subtitle: M&G B/POINT PEN 0.7
overview: The TR3 PLUS is a retractable economic semi-gel 0.7mm ballpoint pen with a unique triangular-shaped barrel designed for enhanced comfort and control while writing. It features ultra-smooth, smear-resistant advanced ink that ensures a flawless writing experience every time. With its durable build and stylish design, the TR3 PLUS is perfect for everyday use in the office, classroom, or at home.

title: M&G B/POINT PEN 1.0 ( EXEC-5 MEDIUM )
subtitle: M&G B/POINT PEN 1.0
overview: The EXEC-5 ballpoint pen is a high-quality writing instrument designed for a smooth and comfortable writing experience. It features a retractable medium point tip that measures 1.0 mm in diameter and is designed for effortless writing. The pen is designed with an ergonomic soft rubber grip that offers a comfortable and secure hold, minimizing hand fatigue during extended writing sessions. The stainless steel ball ensures stable and smooth writing, providing a clean and precise line. The pen's retractable design is both convenient and practical, allowing you to easily store it in your pocket or bag without the risk of ink stains. Overall, the EXEC-5 ballpoint pen is a durable and reliable choice for those who value quality and performance in their writing instruments.

title: M&G 5 COLOURS B/POINT PEN 0.7 ( MULTO 5 )
subtitle: M&G 5 COLOURS B/POINT
overview: The Multo-5 ballpoint pen is an excellent choice for those looking for a versatile writing instrument. With five ink colours (black, blue, red, purple, and green), the pen offers an easy-to-use ink selector that lets you switch between colours with ease. The pen is designed with a comfortable rubber grip that ensures a comfortable writing experience, while the retractable feature offers added convenience. The ink selector is also colour-coded, allowing you to quickly identify the ink colour you need without any hassle. Overall, the Multo-5 ballpoint pen is a reliable and stylish writing instrument that is perfect for home, office, or school use.

title: M&G SEMI-GEL B/POINT PEN 0.7 (4 COLOURS )
subtitle: M&G SEMI-GEL B/POINT PEN
overview: Introducing the ultimate writing companion - our 4-in-1 multi-coloured semi-gel ballpoint pen Wisdom 4. With the ability to write in black, blue, red, and green ink, this pen will have you covered for all your writing needs. The comfortable rubber grip ensures a seamless and comfortable writing experience, while the retractable design adds a touch of convenience to your workday. Our pen also features a colour-coded ink selector for easy ink selection. Designed with professionalism in mind, it is perfect for individuals who demand excellence in their writing tools.

title: M&G 4 COLOURS B/POlNT PEN 0.7 ( UNIQUE MG 4)
subtitle: M&G 4 COLOURS B/POlNT
overview: Introducing our versatile and elegant 4-in-1 multi-coloured Unique MG4 ballpoint pen that exudes convenience and sophistication. With the capability to write in black, blue, red and green ink, it is a must-have for professionals who value precision and efficiency. Its comfortable rubber grip ensures a smooth writing experience, while its retractable design adds a touch of convenience to your writing routine. Designed with style and functionality in mind, this pen is the perfect tool for individuals who demand excellence in all aspects of their work.
